text.title: Short title — what this text covers
text.summary: One sentence: what the agent gets from reading this file.

section.title: Concept name
section.p: Plain explanation of the concept, one or two sentences.

rule.statement: The concrete, testable rule the agent must follow.
rule.rationale: Why this rule exists — empirical anchor or mechanism.

example.code: # incorrect usage result = payload # no validation

section.reference: One-line purpose of the referenced file.

see-also.link: When the linked text is relevant.
